emergency_routing_rules.after_hours_emergency: Transfer emergency calls to Ben directly

non_emergency_routing_rules: Collect caller name, phone number, address, job description, and preferred appointment time. Notify Ben through dashboard/email for scheduling.

call_transfer_rules.fail_message: If transfer fails, inform the caller that the team will follow up shortly.

integration_constraints: Jobber integration with Clara currently under development
Manual entry required until integration is completed
after_hours_flow_summary: After hours, Clara should answer calls, identify emergencies, collect caller details, and transfer emergency issues to Ben. Non-emergency calls should be logged for follow-up the next business day.
office_hours_flow_summary: During business hours Clara answers calls, qualifies the job type, collects caller information, and logs the request for scheduling or dispatch.
pricing_plan: Starter plan $249/month for 500 minutes with a 3 month commitment
questions_or_unknowns: Exact business hours were not confirmed
Whether operations manager Greg should receive notifications
notes: Ben has 30 years of electrical experience and has run his own company for 8 years. Currently operating three vans with subcontractors and plans to expand to five vans. Ben currently handles most administrative tasks and wants Clara to automate call handling and scheduling.
